SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR - PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT REGARDING PAYMENT. PARTIES AGREE TO A PAYMENT PLAN. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL PAY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR $700.00 PAYABLE BY THE END OF OCTOBER 2017 AND $10.00 PER MONTH UNTIL THE DEBIT IS PAID. JUDGMENT CREDITOR SAMUEL LOUIE IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR ARNETTA BROWN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
